experiments.hypothesis: Adding handoff and claim-table artifacts improves downstream agent recovery.

experiments.hypothesis: Customer-specific release notes improve usefulness when grounded in changed files and explicit assumptions.

smallModelCautions: Do not infer a trend from one run.
Change at most four factors per nightly DOE.
Use confidence labels in every recommendation.
Escalate security findings to a stronger reviewer before action.
